Clinical Rotation Programs

Our Services

Comprehensive clinical rotation training designed to empower your medical career in the US healthcare system.

Programs

Clinical Rotation Programs

Our clinical rotation programs are specifically designed for international medical graduates, offering the opportunity to gain essential clinical experience in the US healthcare system.

Clinical Practice Exposure

Experience firsthand how US healthcare operates by observing and participating in clinical workflows, learning critical decision-making and patient management practices from experienced physicians.

Clinical Skills Development

Enhance essential clinical skills through hands-on training in patient care, diagnostics, and medical procedures, ensuring you're well-prepared for US healthcare standards.

Feedback & Evaluation

Receive continuous feedback and evaluations to track your progress and readiness for the next steps in your medical career.

Letter of Recommendation

Students who successfully complete the clinical rotation receive a letter of recommendation from the supervising physician, supporting residency and training applications.

Affordable Program

Our 4-week clinical rotation includes clinical exposure, hands-on training, and expert mentorship for $800. The rotation fee is non-refundable once the period is confirmed.

Program Flyer

Download our clinical rotation program flyer for complete details on requirements and enrollment.

Success Stories

From Our Graduates

Hear from past participants about their experience in our clinical rotation program.

"Interning at Joy Internal Medicine was a valuable stepping stone in my medical journey. I gained crucial skills like taking vitals and performing ECGs, which helped me advance to become a medical assistant and now a graduate student aspiring to be a physician assistant."
Program Graduate
Accepted to Physician Assistant Program in Philadelphia (2018-2019)
"I chose Joy Internal Medicine for my elective to gain experience with Korean patients, and it exceeded my expectations. I was responsible for taking chief complaints, assisting Dr. Kim during consultations, administering vaccines, and checking vitals."
Joseph Choi, MD
Accepted to Pathology Residency 2020
"This experience was invaluable. I gained hands-on clinical experience, observed Dr. Kim's patient interactions, and learned about the US healthcare system. I'm grateful to Dr. Kim for providing such a comprehensive and rewarding opportunity."
Hyundam Gu
Clinical Rotation 2023
